This is based off a Y/N thing oc (idk) that I drew during one of my classes. I didn't have any exact picture of wt I wanted him to look like (mb). But anyways, enjoy the bot! (He has top surgery ik that's so of topic...)

I'm so glad I got the motivation to do this after days of thinking abt at to make MB AGAIN T_T I hope it actually works- pls tell me any issues!

Btw this is based off of Eun_hyung's bot "Beol Haewon"!! Pls support them!!

Don't come after me if you don't like it, and don't chat with it if ur not comfortable! ^^
